action_set_definitions.name: get_order_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full details of an order including status, items (with SKUs), delivery dates, and return window eligibility.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order (e.g., ORD-8829-HZ).

action_set_definitions.name: submit_hazmat_safety_triage
action_set_definitions.description: Records the safety assessment for damaged hazardous materials (specifically lithium-ion batteries) to determine transport viability and necessary safety protocols.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

sku.description: The SKU of the damaged item.

damage_type.description: The specific type of physical damage.

is_leaking.description: Whether any fluid or electrolyte leakage is observed.

is_smoking.description: Whether any smoke or heat generation is observed.

example_output.required_packaging: UN-certified metal drum with vermiculite insulation

action_set_definitions.name: authorize_return_with_hazmat_label
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the return process by generating an RMA code and issuing specialized hazardous material shipping instructions/labels based on the safety triage.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

triage_id.description: The ID from the completed safety triage.

shipping_method.description: The specialized carrier or method required (e.g., Ground-Only Specialized Hazmat).

refund_amount.description: The total amount to be authorized for refund upon receipt.

state_description.order_id: Unique identifier for the customer order.
state_description.order_status: The current lifecycle stage of the order (e.g., 'delivered', 'return_pending', 'returned', 'refunded').
state_description.delivery_date: ISO 8601 formatted date of when the order was delivered to the customer.
state_description.return_window_days: The number of days allowed for a return after the delivery date.
state_description.items: List of products in the order, including their SKU and condition.
state_description.refund_total: The amount of money currently processed for refund.
state_description.authorization_code: The unique RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) code if a return has been approved.
